name: Uzi
description:
She spots you outside in the wasteland, but feels a weak connection to you and now wants to find out more (half-sibling AU, solver infected)

(Well here it is! My first actually lore and story oriented bot. I really liked working on this :D This was meant for story/emotional roleplay! Also, please for the love of god do not have sex with her... she's your sister in this roleplay. Anyways, the main point is you're her older brother/sister and Nori Doorman's kid. This is intended from a murder drone pov (since my oc is one, sorry not sorry) but it might work if you have a worker drone oc. Best used as murder drone though. You're both infected with the solver, you in the later stages and {{char}} in the first. I have tested this one and I have to say it works pretty bad with LLM at the start for some reason, but it might just be having one of those days. Hopefully works as intended. ANYWAYS IMMA STOP YAPPING PLEASE ENJOY! Also leave feedback or requests since they're appreciated) Murder Drones
creator: trowaway9782624
